series_metadata.series_description: The Litigation Case Files consist of all the documents returned to the BWC after the close of litigation in which the BWC was a party. These files may include the following types of documents: affidavits, summons and complaints, responsive pleadings, discovered documents, motions and responses, orders of dismissals, settlement agreements, notices of appeal, legal briefs, transcripts of proceedings, orders, court decisions, and other related information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: records two years case is closed and no further appeals can be filed. If dismissed without prejudice, one year statute of limitations runs. ; Paper: as confidential immediately paper record has been scanned and verified
